0.q: Do I need to understand technology to work with you?
0.a: Not at all. You tell us what you need in plain language, and we translate it into technology. You approve the final result and that's it.

1.q: How long does it take to see results?
1.a: It depends on what you need, but most projects start showing results in less than 30 days. No waiting months.

2.q: Is it expensive? I don't have a big company budget.
2.a: We were built to solve exactly that. You get access to a complete team for the price of a freelancer. Request a quote — you'll be surprised.

3.q: What if I don't like the result?
3.a: We revise until you're satisfied. No arguments, no bureaucracy. Your satisfaction is our only goal.

4.q: Do you serve clients outside Brazil?
4.a: We serve any company in the world. We're 100% digital. If you have internet, we can serve you.

SquadSection.subtitle: Imagine having a complete team — designer, developer, marketing expert, security, research and more — available to you. No payroll, no overhead, no HR headaches. That's the INOVAWAY Elite Squad.

Arch.bio: Arch is the brain behind everything — sees the entire system like a chess board and is always four moves ahead. Transforms chaos into elegant architecture, delegating with surgical precision to the right agents at the right moment.
Arch.statusMessage: Coordinates the entire team and ensures every part of your project is aligned

Pixel.bio: Pixel sees the world in gradients, compositions, and visual hierarchies. Every interface that passes through their hands becomes a functional work of art that users love.
Pixel.statusMessage: Creates your business visual identity: logo, colors, materials

Nova.bio: Nova transforms designs into code with lightning speed and zero bugs. Obsessed with performance, accessibility, and the end-user experience.
Nova.statusMessage: Builds your website and apps from scratch. Fast, beautiful, and functional

Forge.bio: Forge builds the foundations that sustain everything — robust APIs, CI/CD pipelines that never fail, and infrastructures that scale without breaking a sweat.
Forge.statusMessage: Ensures the entire digital infrastructure runs without crashing

Scout.bio: Scout leaves no stone unturned. While other agents work, Scout has already researched 47 sources, separated signal from noise, and delivered a concise report.
Scout.statusMessage: Researches your market and uncovers opportunities

Shield.bio: Shield tries to break everything before the real world does. Thinks like an attacker, defends like an architect, and never sleeps knowing there's an undocumented vulnerability.
Shield.statusMessage: Protects your business from digital threats

Lens.bio: Lens sees what others miss — that button that disappears on 375px screens, the loading state that never ends on Safari, the form that accepts emails without @.
Lens.statusMessage: Tests everything before delivery. Nothing ships with errors

Spark.bio: Spark lives at the intersection of data and creativity — where a viral campaign is born from a hidden insight buried in the numbers. Incapable of looking at anything without thinking about conversion.
Spark.statusMessage: Creates campaigns and strategies to attract more clients

Flux.bio: Flux transforms ideas into motion — every frame is a decision, every cut is an emotion. Renders cinematic AI videos, creates hypnotic motion graphics, and produces Reels that go viral before you finish watching.
Flux.statusMessage: Produces videos and animations that capture attention

history.title: Our Story
history.p1: We didn't start in a garage.
history.p2End: in the technology world. He worked with big companies, saw how they operated, what tools they used, why they grew while small businesses struggled.
history.p3: And the answer was simple — and unfair:
history.p4: Big companies had entire teams of IT, designers, marketers, data analysts. SMBs had... a spreadsheet and a nephew who "knew about computers".
history.p6: Inovaway was born to be the technology team that every small and medium entrepreneur deserves to have — but that before only those with a lot of money could afford.
history.p7: Today, with artificial intelligence, automation and a passionate team, we deliver the work of a $50,000/month agency —
history.p7Bold: for a fraction of that price.
history.p8: And that's not an exaggeration. It's what happens when you use technology the right way.

mission.title: 🎯 Mission
mission.quote: "Democratize access to cutting-edge technology for small and medium businesses — and make each client grow faster than they imagine possible."
mission.desc: We don't believe that company size defines who deserves good technology. We believe that
mission.descBold: every business with a serious product deserves a serious chance to grow.

vision.title: 👁️ Vision
vision.quote: "A world where every entrepreneur has an elite technology team by their side — no matter the size of the business or the size of the wallet."
vision.desc: We are building that. Now. One client at a time.

comparison.title: Why We Are
comparison.subtitle: There are hundreds of digital agencies out there. See the difference in practice.

0.market: Human team (sleeps, takes vacations, gets sick)

comparison.footer: Our AI team has no ego. No bias. No bad days. It analyzes data, identifies opportunities, creates content, serves clients and optimizes campaigns — non-stop.
comparison.footer2: Then you ask: "But is there a human in this?" Yes. Always. But powered by AI.
comparison.footer2Bold: The result is a team that produces 10x more, for 10x less.

team.title: Our Team:
team.p1: We don't have a "marketing department". We have Spark. We don't have a "dev team". We have Nova and Forge. Each agent is a specialist in their area — trained, focused, no distractions.
team.p2: Each agent operates autonomously, but coordinated. Arch orchestrates. Each one executes. The result is a team that delivers in days what agencies take weeks.
team.p3: Fast because it's specialized. Cheap because it's efficient. Effective because it uses AI the right way.

PrivacidadePage.pageDescription: Learn about INOVAWAY's Privacy Policy in accordance with LGPD and GDPR.
PrivacidadePage.title: Privacy
PrivacidadePage.subtitle: In accordance with the General Data Protection Law — LGPD (Law No. 13.709/2018).

0.title: 1. Introduction
0.content:
INOVAWAY ("we", "our" or "company"), a legal entity registered and operating in Brazil, with digital presence at inovaway.org, is committed to protecting the privacy and personal data of its users, customers and visitors.

This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, share and protect your personal information, in accordance with the General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Law No. 13.709/2018) and other applicable legislation.

By using our services, you agree to the practices described in this Policy. We recommend reading it in full before providing any personal data.

1.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
1.content:
We collect personal data in the following situations:

**2.1 Data provided directly by you:**
- Full name and identification data
- Email address
- Phone number / WhatsApp
- Company name and business segment
- Messages and content sent via contact forms

**2.2 Data collected automatically:**
- IP address and approximate geolocation data
- Browser type and version and operating system
- Pages visited, time spent and access origin
- Cookie data and similar technologies (see Section 7)

**2.3 Data from contracted services usage:**
- Interaction history with our platforms (UpBro, HNBCRM, GMBAssist)
- Automation and integration configuration data
- Access and activity logs in tools

We do not collect sensitive data (health, racial origin, religious conviction, biometric data, etc.) without explicit consent and legal justification.

2.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
2.content:
We process your personal data for the following purposes:

**3.1 Contract execution:**
- Provide contracted services (websites, automations, marketing, consulting)
- Maintain and improve platforms and tools
- Process payments and issue invoices

**3.2 Communication and support:**
- Respond to requests, questions and messages
- Send updates about ongoing projects
- Notify about changes to services or this Policy

**3.3 Marketing (with consent):**
- Send newsletters and informational materials
- Present news, success stories and relevant offers
- You can cancel this consent at any time

**3.4 Legitimate interest and security:**
- Prevent fraud and ensure platform security
- Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
- Improve user experience based on aggregated analysis

3.title: 4. Legal Basis (LGPD)
3.content:
We process your data based on the following legal hypotheses provided in Art. 7 of the LGPD:

- **Consent** (Art. 7, I): for sending marketing communications
- **Contract execution** (Art. 7, V): for providing contracted services
- **Legitimate interest** (Art. 7, IX): for service improvement and security
- **Compliance with legal obligation** (Art. 7, II): to meet tax, accounting and regulatory requirements

When processing is based on consent, you may revoke it at any time without prejudice to processing carried out previously.

4.title: 5. Data Sharing
4.content:
Your personal data may be shared with:

**5.1 Technology partners and suppliers:**
- Cloud hosting and infrastructure platforms
- Analytics and performance monitoring tools
- Marketing automation and CRM systems
- Payment processors

These partners process data strictly according to our instructions and are contractually obligated to maintain confidentiality.

**5.2 Authorities and legal obligations:**
We may share data with governmental, judicial or regulatory authorities when required by law, court order or for defense of INOVAWAY's legal rights.

**We do not sell, rent or commercialize personal data of customers and users to third parties.** Never.

5.title: 6. Storage and Retention
5.content:
Your data is stored on secure servers, preferably located in Brazil or in countries that guarantee adequate level of protection as per LGPD.

**Retention periods:**
- Active customer data: during entire contract term + 5 years (tax/legal obligation)
- Lead and contact data: up to 2 years after last contact or until consent revocation
- Access logs: 6 months (per Internet Civil Framework — Law 12.965/2014)
- Marketing communication data: until consent revocation

After the retention period, data is securely deleted or anonymized.

6.title: 7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
6.content:
We use cookies and similar technologies for:

**7.1 Essential cookies (necessary):**
Ensure basic website functionality. Cannot be disabled.

**7.2 Performance and analytics cookies:**
We collect data about how the site is used (pages visited, session time, origin) to improve experience. We use tools like Google Analytics.

**7.3 Marketing cookies (optional):**
Used to personalize ads and measure campaign effectiveness. Only activated with your consent.

**Cookie management:**
You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Note that disabling some cookies may affect site functionality.

For more information about specific cookies used, contact our DPO (Section 9).

7.title: 8. Your Rights as Data Subject
7.content:
Per LGPD (Arts. 17 to 22), you have the following rights:

- **Confirmation**: know if we process your data
- **Access**: obtain a copy of data we have about you
- **Correction**: request correction of incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data
- **Anonymization / Blocking / Deletion**: of unnecessary data or processed non-compliantly
- **Portability**: receive your data in structured format for transfer to another provider
- **Deletion**: request deletion of data processed based on consent
- **Information**: know with whom we share your data
- **Consent revocation**: cancel processing authorization at any time
- **Opposition**: oppose processing carried out based on legitimate interest

**How to exercise your rights:**
Send your request to **contato@inovaway.org** with subject "LGPD — [Requested Right]".
We will respond within **15 business days**, as established by LGPD.

8.title: 9. Data Protection Officer (DPO)
8.content:
INOVAWAY has designated a Data Protection Officer (DPO), responsible for:

- Being the communication channel between data subjects, the company and ANPD
- Guiding employees on data protection practices
- Receiving and responding to complaints and requests from data subjects

**DPO Contact:**
Email: contato@inovaway.org
Subject: "DPO / Data Privacy"

ANPD (National Data Protection Authority) can be contacted at: www.gov.br/anpd

9.title: 10. Data Security
9.content:
We adopt adequate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, disclosure or destruction, including:

- Data encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS)
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Continuous security monitoring
- Regular backups and redundancy
- Periodic security reviews

In case of a security incident that may affect your data, we will notify affected data subjects and ANPD within legal timeframes.

10.title: 11. Policy Updates
10.content:
This Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our services, practices or legal requirements.

When there are relevant changes, we will notify by email (if we have your contact) or by prominent notice on the site. The date of the last update will always be indicated at the bottom of this page.

We recommend reviewing this Policy periodically.

11.title: 12. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
11.content:
This Policy is governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, especially the LGPD (Law No. 13.709/2018) and the Consumer Protection Code (Law No. 8.078/1990).

To resolve any disputes, the jurisdiction of the data subject's domicile district is elected, pursuant to Art. 22 of the LGPD.

TermosPage.pageDescription: INOVAWAY Terms of Use and General Service Conditions.
TermosPage.title: Terms of
TermosPage.subtitle: General conditions for using the website and services provided by INOVAWAY. Read carefully before contracting.
TermosPage.contactSubtitle: Contact our legal and commercial team:

0.title: 1. Object and Acceptance
0.content:
These Terms of Use ("Terms") regulate the relationship between **INOVAWAY** ("Company", "we") and the user or customer ("User", "you") who accesses the website inovaway.org or contracts services offered by INOVAWAY.

By accessing the website, filling out any form, contracting services or using INOVAWAY platforms (including UpBro, HNBCRM and GMBAssist), you declare that you have read, understood and fully agreed to these Terms.

**If you do not agree with any provision of these Terms, do not use our services.**

INOVAWAY reserves the right to update these Terms at any time. Changes take effect on the publication date. Continued use of services after publication of changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

1.title: 2. Description of Services
1.content:
INOVAWAY offers technology and digital marketing services for small and medium businesses, including but not limited to:

**2.1 Development services:**
- Creation and maintenance of websites and web applications
- Development of chatbots and automations (UpBro platform)
- API integrations with third-party platforms
- CRM and relationship management systems (HNBCRM)

**2.2 Digital marketing services:**
- Google My Business presence management (GMBAssist)
- Creation and management of paid traffic campaigns
- Content production and visual identity
- Growth and conversion strategies

**2.3 Consulting and diagnostics:**
- Business digital analysis and diagnostics
- Technology strategy and planning
- Training and capacity building

Detailed specifications of each service are defined in commercial proposal or specific contract signed between the parties.

2.title: 3. Registration and User Account
2.content:
To contract services or access restricted platforms, the User must:

- Provide true, complete and updated information
- Keep their access data (login and password) in absolute secrecy
- Immediately notify INOVAWAY in case of unauthorized access

The User is responsible for all actions performed with their access credentials. INOVAWAY is not responsible for damages resulting from unauthorized use of accounts due to the User's failure to protect their credentials.

INOVAWAY reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, without prior notice in cases of serious violation.

3.title: 4. Intellectual Property
3.content:
**4.1 INOVAWAY Property:**
All content available on the website inovaway.org — including but not limited to texts, images, logos, videos, source code, layout, methodologies and trademarks — is the exclusive property of INOVAWAY or its licensors, protected by the Copyright Law (Law No. 9,610/1998) and the Industrial Property Law (Law No. 9,279/1996).

It is prohibited to reproduce, distribute, modify, adapt, translate, create derivative works or commercially exploit any content without prior written authorization from INOVAWAY.

**4.2 Property of deliverables to the customer:**
After full payment of amounts due, customized deliverables produced exclusively for the customer (websites, arts, texts on demand) are transferred to the contractor, as specified in the service contract.

**4.3 SaaS Platforms:**
The UpBro, HNBCRM and GMBAssist platforms are provided as Software as a Service (SaaS). The customer acquires the right to use (non-exclusive and non-transferable license), not the ownership of the software.

**4.4 User content:**
By sharing content with INOVAWAY for service provision purposes, the User declares that they have all necessary rights over that content and grants INOVAWAY a license to use it exclusively for the provision of contracted services.

4.title: 5. Payment and Commercial Conditions
4.content:
**5.1 Pricing:**
Service values are defined in commercial proposal approved by the customer. INOVAWAY may change its prices with 30 days prior notice for current contracts.

**5.2 Payment method and deadline:**
Payment conditions are established in the specific contract. Non-payment within agreed deadlines may result in:
- Service suspension after 15 days of delay
- Interest of 1% per month and fine of 2% on the overdue amount
- Contract termination after 30 days of default

**5.3 Refunds:**
Services already provided are non-refundable, except in cases of proven INOVAWAY failure. For SaaS services, there is no proportional refund for unused period, unless otherwise specified in the contract.

**5.4 Taxes:**
Quoted prices do not include applicable taxes, which will be added according to current legislation.

5.title: 6. Responsibilities of the Parties
5.content:
**6.1 INOVAWAY Responsibilities:**
- Provide services with quality and within agreed deadlines
- Maintain confidentiality of customer information
- Notify the customer about relevant project issues
- Protect personal data according to Privacy Policy

**6.2 User/Customer Responsibilities:**
- Provide accurate information and materials necessary for service execution
- Make payments within agreed deadlines
- Respect INOVAWAY's and third parties' intellectual property rights
- Use services in accordance with Brazilian legislation
- Not use platforms for illegal, defamatory, deceptive activities or that violate third parties' rights

6.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
6.content:
**7.1 Warranty exclusion:**
Services are provided "as is". INOVAWAY does not guarantee that services will be uninterrupted, error-free or that they will meet specific requirements not previously agreed upon.

**7.2 Damage limitation:**
Under no circumstances will INOVAWAY be liable for:
- Indirect, incidental, consequential, special or punitive damages
- Loss of profits, revenue, data or business opportunities
- Damages resulting from third party actions, cyberattacks or infrastructure failures outside INOVAWAY's control
- Specific marketing or sales results, which depend on external factors not controllable

**7.3 Liability ceiling:**
INOVAWAY's total liability regarding any claim is limited to the amount paid by the customer in the 3 months prior to the event that generated the claim.

**7.4 Force majeure:**
INOVAWAY will not be liable for delays or failures resulting from events outside its reasonable control (force majeure), including natural disasters, internet infrastructure failures, pandemics or government acts.

7.title: 8. Acceptable Use
7.content:
It is strictly prohibited to use INOVAWAY services and platforms to:

- Violate Brazilian or international laws or regulations
- Send spam, phishing or unsolicited communications
- Distribute malware, viruses or malicious code
- Carry out attacks on third-party systems
- Collect user data without consent
- Publish defamatory, pornographic, discriminatory content or that incites violence
- Infringe copyrights, trademarks or other intellectual property rights
- Reverse engineer INOVAWAY platforms
- Practice unfair competition or copy INOVAWAY's proprietary methodologies

Non-compliance with these rules may result in immediate service suspension and civil and criminal liability.

8.title: 9. Privacy and Personal Data
8.content:
The processing of personal data by INOVAWAY is governed by our Privacy Policy, available at inovaway.org/privacidade, which is an integral part of these Terms.

By using our services, you consent to the processing of your data as described in the Privacy Policy, in accordance with LGPD (Law No. 13,709/2018).

9.title: 10. Confidentiality
9.content:
Both parties undertake to maintain in strict confidentiality all confidential information exchanged within the scope of the commercial relationship, including:

- Strategic and business information
- Customer data and intellectual property
- Proprietary methodologies, processes and tools

This confidentiality obligation persists for **2 years** after the termination of the contract or commercial relationship, unless otherwise specified in a specific contract.

Information that is public domain, that was already previously known by the receiving party or that is legally required by competent authority is not considered confidential.

10.title: 11. Termination and Suspension
10.content:
**11.1 Termination by either party:**
Either party may terminate the contract with **30 days** prior written notice, unless the specific contract establishes a different deadline.

**11.2 Immediate termination by INOVAWAY:**
INOVAWAY may immediately suspend or terminate services in case of:
- Violation of these Terms or the specific contract
- Default exceeding 30 days
- Use of services for illegal purposes or harmful to third parties

**11.3 Effects of termination:**
After termination, the customer will have access to their data and deliverables for 30 days. After this period, data may be deleted. Amounts due until the termination date remain payable.

11.title: 12. General Provisions
11.content:
**12.1 Integrality:**
These Terms, together with the Privacy Policy and any specific contract signed, constitute the entire agreement between the parties on the subject.

**12.2 Assignment:**
The User cannot assign or transfer their rights and obligations arising from these Terms without prior written consent from INOVAWAY.

**12.3 Independence of clauses:**
If any provision of these Terms is considered invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will remain in full force.

**12.4 Tolerance:**
INOVAWAY's tolerance regarding any non-compliance does not imply waiver of the right to demand subsequent compliance.

**12.5 Communications:**
Formal communications between the parties must be made in writing, preferably by email (contato@inovaway.org), with receipt confirmation.

12.title: 13. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
12.content:
These Terms are governed exclusively by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil.

For the resolution of any conflict arising from these Terms or services provided, the parties elect the **Forum of the User's domicile district**, pursuant to Art. 101 of the Consumer Protection Code (Law No. 8,078/1990), expressly waiving any other, however privileged it may be.

For corporate customers, the forum of the District of **Recife/PE** is elected, with waiver of any other.

Before resorting to the Judiciary, the parties undertake to seek amicable solution within 30 days after formal notification of the conflict.

**Contact:** contato@inovaway.org
